Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer in the Pin2You application.

userId.description: Reference to the user's authentication ID. (Relationship: User 1:1 Customer)

Driver.title: Driver
Driver.description: Represents a driver in the Pin2You application.

userId.description: Reference to the user's authentication ID. (Relationship: User 1:1 Driver)

vehicleType.description: The type of vehicle the driver uses.

paymentGatewayRecipientId.description: The secure ID from the payment gateway for this driver's bank account.

licenseUrl.description: URL for the driver's license image.

status.description: The approval status of the driver.

StoreOwner.title: StoreOwner
StoreOwner.description: Represents a store owner in the Pin2You application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the store owner.

userId.description: Reference to the user's authentication ID. (Relationship: User 1:1 StoreOwner)

paymentGatewayRecipientId.description: The secure ID from the payment gateway for this owner's bank account.

status.description: The approval status of the store owner.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents a restaurant or store in the Pin2You application.

storeOwnerId.description: Reference to the StoreOwner. (Relationship: StoreOwner 1:N Restaurant)

promotionBannerText.description: A short text to display as a promotional banner on the store's page.

status.description: The approval status of the restaurant.

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents a menu item offered by a restaurant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the menu item.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:N MenuItem)

name.description: The name of the menu item.

description.description: A description of the menu item.

price.description: The price of the menu item.

promotionalPrice.description: The discounted price of the menu item, if a promotion is active.

imageUrl.description: URL of the menu item's image.

isSoldOut.description: Indicates if the menu item is currently sold out.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a customer.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:N Order)

storeOwnerId.description: Denormalized reference to the StoreOwner for query authorization.

driverId.description: Reference to the Driver. (Relationship: Driver 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., Placed, Accepted, Preparing, Out for Delivery, Delivered).

itemsTotal.description: The subtotal amount of the order (sum of item prices).

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

deliveryAddress.description: The delivery address for the order.

notes.description: Optional special instructions or notes from the customer for the order.

isRated.description: Flag to indicate if the order has been rated by the customer.

participantUids.description: An array of user IDs who are allowed to read the order (customer, storeOwner, driver). Used for security rules.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

menuItemId.description: Reference to the MenuItem. (Relationship: MenuItem 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the menu item in the order.

itemPrice.description: The price of this particular menu item

DriverLocation.title: DriverLocation
DriverLocation.description: Represents the real-time location of a driver.

lat.description: The latitude of the driver's location.

lng.description: The longitude of the driver's location.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the location was last updated.

Rating.title: Rating
Rating.description: Represents a rating provided by a customer for an order.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order. (Relationship: Order 1:1 Rating)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who made the rating.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant being rated.

driverId.description: Reference to the Driver being rated.

restaurantComment.description: Optional comment for the restaurant rating.

driverComment.description: Optional comment for the driver rating.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the rating was submitted.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents the financial ledger entry for a single order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the transaction record.

gatewayTransactionId.description: The unique ID for this transaction from the payment gateway (e.g., PayFast, Yoco).

totalAmount.description: The total amount charged to the customer.

platformFee.description: The portion of the total amount that belongs to the Pin2You platform.

restaurantPayout.description: The amount to be paid out to the restaurant for this order.

driverPayout.description: The amount to be paid out to the driver for this delivery.

status.description: The financial status of this transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was recorded.

Payout.title: Payout
Payout.description: Represents a batch payout made to a driver or store owner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payout record.

recipientId.description: The user ID of the driver or store owner receiving the payout.

gatewayPayoutId.description: The unique ID for this payout from the payment gateway.

transactionIds.description: An array of Transaction IDs included in this payout batch.

payoutDate.description: Timestamp when the payout was initiated.

definition.description: Stores customer profiles. Uses path-based ownership, secured by userId. Ensures only the authenticated user can access their Customer profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the authenticated user.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The ID of the customer profile. Must match userId.

definition.description: Stores driver profiles. Uses path-based ownership, secured by userId. Ensures only the authenticated user can access their Driver profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the authenticated user.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The ID of the driver profile. Must match userId.

definition.description: Stores store owner profiles. Uses path-based ownership, secured by userId. Ensures only the authenticated user can access their StoreOwner profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the authenticated user.

params.name: storeOwnerId
params.description: The ID of the store owner profile. Must match userId.

definition.description: Stores restaurant information. Allows listing of all restaurants.  Access control is based on the storeOwnerId field, which allows filtering restaurants by their owner.
Stores menu items for each restaurant. Access control can be based on the parent restaurant's storeOwnerId to verify ownership.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: The ID of the menu item.

definition.description: Stores order information. Includes denormalized customerId, restaurantId, and driverId for authorization independence.
Stores individual items within an order. Access control is based on the parent order's customerId, restaurantId, and driverId.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The ID of the order item.

definition.description: Stores the last known location of a driver. Secured by driverId, ensuring only the authenticated driver can update their own location.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The ID of the driver. Must match the authenticated user's ID.

definition.description: Stores customer ratings for orders, restaurants, and drivers. Secured by customerId, ensuring only the user who placed the order can create a rating for it.
Stores financial transaction records for each order. Access is restricted to backend processes/admin roles.
Stores records of batch payouts to drivers and store owners. Access is restricted to backend processes/admin roles.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to align with the application's core features, focusing on role-based access control and data ownership. The design prioritizes Authorization Independence by denormalizing relevant authorization data, specifically for Restaurants and Orders. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules, ensuring atomicity of operations. Structural Segregation is used to isolate data based on access needs, as seen in the `/users/{userId}` collection, which houses user-specific data. The application uses Path-Based Ownership for `Customer`, `Driver`, and `StoreOwner` profiles which are placed under `/users/{userId}`. Restaurants are under `/restaurants/{restaurantId}` with `storeOwnerId` attribute which could be used to list resources owned by the user. Order data are placed under the `/orders/{orderId}`, with denormalized `customerId`, `restaurantId`, and `driverId`. The structure enables simple and secure `list` operations, effectively addressing QAPs. Explicit state modeling is used via the `status` field in the `Order` entity.

Authorization Independence is achieved by avoiding hierarchical dependencies. For example, access to Orders does not require fetching customer or restaurant details. The `customerId`, `restaurantId` and `driverId` within the `/orders/{orderId}` collection allow for querying and filtering orders based on these IDs directly, without needing to perform additional reads.

For QAPs, the structure supports secure `list` operations via collection-based access control. Listing Restaurants could be restricted based on `storeOwnerId` or `category`. Orders can be listed based on `customerId`, `restaurantId`, or `driverId`.

Data integrity is supported by the inherent structure (e.g., 1:N relationships are represented through subcollections or document references).
